title: Single, FEIE §911 (foreign-earned income exclusion)
description: U.S. citizen working remotely from Portugal full year. Total foreign-earned wages $130,000. §911 cap TY2024 = $126,500 (single, full year). Engine excludes $126,500; $3,500 remainder taxed at marginal rate. Stacking rule applied: tax computed at marginal rate that would have applied including FEIE.
expectations: Stacking rule: tax computed as if FEIE-included income, then back out
